channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Governor Uba Sani of Kaduna Appoints New Advisers and Board Chairmen to Boost Governance
item.description: Kaduna State Governor, Uba Sani, don appoint plenty new advisers, board chairmen and senior special assistants to help push im administration transformative agenda and improve good governance for the ...

item.title: BJP Focuses on Telangana Following Success in West Bengal
item.description: Riding on its recent victories in the Northeastern states, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) is now concentrating on Telangana as its next significant electoral target in South India. Prime Minister Na...

item.title: Military police response to Ottawa wellness check under scrutiny after soldier’s death
item.description: A rare public hearing is examining the 2024 death by suicide of Master Cpl. Shaun Orton in Ottawa, focusing on allegations of delayed and inadequate response by military police. Evidence revealed that...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Commemorates First Anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, Praises Armed Forces
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Saturday stated that Pakistan can neither be intimidated nor subdued by any aggressor, marking the first anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, the confrontation with India last ...

item.title: Suhn and Wordz Unite Afro-Trap with Mbira Influences
item.description: Zimbabwean hip-hop artist Suhn and South African rapper Wordz have joined forces on a new single titled 'The Truth', blending traditional mbira sounds with modern trap music. Suhn, whose real name is ...

item.title: Zanzibar starts contract farming project to help seaweed farmers increase production and earnings
item.description: At least 200 seaweed farmers in Zanzibar, mostly women, are set to benefit from a new contract farming project aimed at improving their livelihoods. The Seaweed Social Enterprise Project (SESEP) is be...

item.title: Southampton FC faces FA charges over alleged training session surveillance
item.description: Southampton Football Club has been formally charged by the Football Association (FA) in connection with an alleged incident involving the surveillance of a Middlesbrough training session. According to...

item.title: Pregnant Woman Dies in Sleep, Husband Shares Grief and Final Moments
item.description: Avi Carey is facing one of the hardest moments of his life after losing his wife Tiffany and their unborn child just days after their baby shower. Tiffany, who was heavily pregnant, passed away in her...

item.title: ASEAN Leaders Reaffirm Call for Self-Restraint and Peaceful Resolution in South China Sea
item.description: Leaders of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) have once again called for self-restraint among parties involved in the disputed South China Sea during the 48th ASEAN Summit held in Cebu...

item.title: Pedestrian Killed After Entering Runway at Denver Airport
item.description: A tragic incident occurred at Denver International Airport in the United States when a pedestrian died after being struck by a departing Frontier Airlines flight. The person had breached airport secur...

item.title: Vijay of TVK stakes claim to form government in Tamil Nadu with alliance support, to take oath as CM
item.description: In a significant political development in Tamil Nadu, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) chief and actor-turned-politician Vijay is set to take oath as the Chief Minister on 10th May 2026 at 10 am in Chen...

item.title: France pivots to new African partners after setbacks in West Africa
item.description: France, facing significant losses of influence in its former West African colonies, is attempting to strengthen ties with other nations across the continent. This shift will be highlighted at an upcom...

item.title: AI Bridges Communication Gap for Jigawa Pilgrims During Hajj Journey
item.description: As thousands of pilgrims dey waka for Saudi Arabia for the 2026 Hajj season, technology and Artificial Intelligence don show say dem fit really help solve communication wahala. One group of pilgrims w...

item.title: Finding Balance: From Busy City Life to Peaceful Prairie Living
item.description: Shandean Reid and her husband experienced the pressures of urban life in Kingston, Jamaica, and later in the Greater Toronto Area, where demanding careers and long commutes left them exhausted and dis...

item.title: Collingwood's heavy reliance on Nick Daicos exposed in heavy loss to Geelong amid injuries and absences
item.description: Collingwood suffered a significant nine-goal defeat to Geelong in a Friday night AFL match, highlighting the Magpies' increasing dependence on superstar Nick Daicos as they navigate injuries and key a...

item.title: Chief of Defence Staff to address first anniversary of Marka-e-Haq at GHQ
item.description: The Chief of Defence Staff, Field Marshal Asim Munir, will be attending the ceremony at GHQ Rawalpindi tomorrow as the chief guest to mark the first anniversary of the Marka-e-Haq operation. The event...

item.title: Tanroads removes roadside businesses to improve safety on Arusha Bypass before Afcon 2027
item.description: In Arusha, the Tanzania National Roads Agency (Tanroads) has begun clearing the Arusha Bypass road reserve to make the area safer and ready for upcoming infrastructure projects ahead of the 2027 Afric...

item.title: Apple Tests AirPods with Environmental AI Cameras, Not for Photography
item.description: Apple is reportedly in the final stages of testing a new AirPods model that includes small cameras in each earbud, according to Bloomberg. These AirPods will feature longer stems but will otherwise ma...

item.title: Peugeot 408 review: A high-quality family-friendly crossover
item.description: Peugeot has launched its new 408 fastback crossover saloon, which CEO Alain Favey describes as the 'John Lewis of cars' due to its focus on quality and customer experience. Positioned in the upper-mid...

item.title: Jimmy Lai’s family appeals to Trump for release during upcoming meeting with Xi Jinping
item.description: Pro-democracy activist and media mogul Jimmy Lai, a vocal critic of Beijing, is serving a 20-year prison sentence in Hong Kong after being convicted on charges related to national security and seditio...
